message:
test(fuzz): add 1037 new regression seeds for fuzz_raptorq_envelope_decrypt

Check in 1037 new corpus inputs discovered during a recent run of the
`fuzz_raptorq_envelope_decrypt` target. Each seed is a distinct input
vector that exercised a previously unseen code path or branch
coverage edge inside the RaptorQ envelope decoder (see
crates/fcp-core/src/.../raptorq_envelope.rs).

Follows the repo's existing convention (documented by ~10k already-
tracked files under fuzz/corpus/*) of treating fuzzing corpora as
check-in-able regression seeds so that:

  - `cargo fuzz run fuzz_raptorq_envelope_decrypt` starts from a
    useful coverage floor on every machine instead of re-discovering
    known inputs;
  - CI or pre-commit reruns stay fast;
  - future crashes inside the envelope decoder can be attributed to
    (a) the fix, or (b) a specific seed, by bisecting against this
    snapshot.

Total added on-disk size ~96 KB across the 1037 files (each seed is
tens to low hundreds of bytes). No code changes, no existing corpus
files modified.
